page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c4g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance belonging to the ecs.gn5 family. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, operating without hyperthreading at 1.0 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 60.0 GB of system memory, providing 7.5 GB of RAM per core, and runs on a KVM hypervisor.

For acceleration and storage, this server bundles two NVIDIA P100 GPUs with a combined total of 32 GB VRAM. Local storage is provided via a 944 GB SSD. The network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 5 Gbps. This hardware configuration is designed for workloads requiring parallel processing capabilities alongside local high-speed storage.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation, dual GPUs, and local SSD storage, this instance is suited for GPU-accelerated workloads such as legacy deep learning training, parallel scientific computing, and database operations that benefit from GPU acceleration. The lack of hyperthreading ensures predictable CPU performance for compute-bound tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c4g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. The system is configured with 60.0 GB of RAM, translating to 7.5 GB per core. For parallel processing workloads, the instance includes two NVIDIA P100 GPUs offering a total of 32 GB VRAM. Storage needs are met by a bundled 944 GB local SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a 5 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This resource profile makes the instance highly suitable for legacy machine learning, scientific simulations, and database tasks requiring dedicated CPU resources and GPU acceleration.
